# GreenFort Materials

> Premium AAC blocks and building materials supplier in Trivandrum, Kerala, India. Authorised Renacon dealers offering eco-friendly, lightweight, and durable construction materials for residential and commercial projects. Tagline: "Building a Greener, Stronger Tomorrow."

GreenFort Materials supplies Autoclaved Aerated Concrete (AAC) blocks, rapid walls, tile adhesives, plasters, mortars, decorative jalis, and steel windows to builders and contractors across Trivandrum (Thiruvananthapuram). As authorised Renacon dealers, the company focuses on strength, durability, thermal insulation, and sustainability, with reliable local delivery and expert guidance.

## Pages

- [Home](https://thegreenfort.com/): Company overview, why choose AAC blocks, about the company, client testimonials, contact form, and location map.
- [Products](https://thegreenfort.com/products.html): Full product catalogue organised by category (AAC Blocks & Walls, Adhesives & Plasters, Decorative, Steel Windows) with features and specifications.

## Products

### AAC Blocks & Walls
- Renacon 4 Inch AAC Block — lightweight, durable blocks for interior walls and partitions
- Renacon 5 Inch AAC Block — versatile blocks for interior and exterior walls
- Renacon 6 Inch AAC Block — ideal for exterior walls with superior thermal insulation
- Renacon 8 Inch AAC Block — heavy-duty blocks for load-bearing structures
- Renacon Rapid Walls — pre-fabricated wall panels for fast construction
- G Vector AAC Blocks — premium-quality AAC blocks
- Birla Aerocon AAC Panels — pre-fabricated wall panels
- Birla Aerocon Blocks — quality AAC blocks

### Adhesives & Plasters
- Renabond — premium factory-made AAC joint adhesive for thin joints
- RenaFix — ready-mix cement plaster with polymer additives
- Renaplast — exterior cement plaster for walls, concrete, and AAC blocks
- Ramco Tile Adhesives — tile adhesive for ceramic, vitrified, and porcelain tiles
- Ramco AAC Block Joint Mortar — eco-friendly joint mortar for thin joints
- Ramco Eco Plaster — environmentally friendly plaster for smooth finishes

### Decorative
- Terracotta Jalis — terracotta jalis for architectural decoration and ventilation
- Designer Jalis — custom designer jalis with intricate patterns

### Steel Windows
- Steel Window - 1 Pane — durable powder-coated steel windows
- Steel Window - 2 Pane — space-saving steel windows with smooth operation
- Steel Window - 3 Pane — steel windows with excellent ventilation

## Contact

- Location: Trivandrum (Thiruvananthapuram), Kerala, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98092 89089

- Working Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## About

GreenFort Materials is committed to providing innovative and sustainable building solutions that meet high standards of quality and performance. As authorised Renacon dealers, the company offers premium AAC blocks and complementary building materials, backed by expert advice and dependable delivery across Trivandrum.
